news.headline: Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: FBRT) to release Q4 2024 results on Feb 13, 2025, and host conference call on Feb 14 at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: A real estate company, Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: FBRT), stated that it plans to disclose its Q4 2024 results on February 13, 2025, post the New York Stock Exchange trading session. Subsequently, on February 14, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET, the company will conduct a conference call and live audio webcast to review its financial outcomes. Interested parties can access details regarding the call and webcast on the official Company's website.

news.headline: CBRE Global Real Estate Income Fund (NYSE: IGR) declares monthly distributions for Q1 2025 and plans webinar with portfolio management.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, the CBRE Global Real Estate Income Fund (NYSE: IGR) has announced monthly distributions for the 1st quarter of 2025. Additionally, they will be hosting a webinar with their portfolio management team. This update comes as the fund continues its efforts to provide investors with regular income. The webinar aims to provide insights into the fund's performance and strategy moving forward. Shareholders are encouraged to participate in this event to gain a better understanding of the fund's operations. For further details and to participate in the webinar, interested individuals can refer to the official communication from the CBRE Global Real Estate Income Fund.

news.headline: Montana Renewables closes $1.44B DOE loan for renewable fuels/biomass energy facility; $782M to be funded this month; 300M gallons/year Sustainable Aviation Fuel capacity.
news.summary: A loan amount totaling $782 million will be received in stages, with an initial disbursement expected to be completed by the end of this month. The rest of the funds will follow through the construction phase. The loan guarantee from the Department of Energy is enabling the expansion of Sustainable Aviation Fuel production capacity to reach 300 million gallons annually. This development is set in Indianapolis and took place on January 10, 2025.

news.headline: Coca-Cola Consolidated declares $2.50 per share dividend for Q1 2025, payable on Feb 7 to shareholders on record by Jan 24.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on January 10, 2025, Coca-Cola Consolidated, Inc. (NASDAQ: COKE) revealed a dividend declaration for Q1 2025 at $2.50 per share for its Common Stock and Class B Common Stock. The dividend is set to be distributed on February 7, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of the end of business on January 24, 2025.

news.headline: WD-40 Company Q1 2025: Net sales $153.5M, up 9% YoY.
news.summary: In San Diego, the WD-40 Company (NASDAQ:WDFC) released its financial results for the first fiscal quarter ending on November 30, 2024. Total net sales for the quarter amounted to $153.5 million, representing a 9 percent rise from the same quarter in the previous year. WD-40 is a global marketing firm focused on creating long-lasting positive experiences through developing and distributing problem-solving products for workshops, factories, and homes worldwide.

news.headline: Triumph Financial (Nasdaq: TFIN) to release Q4 2024 financial results on Jan 22, 2025. Details at tfin.com.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Triumph Financial, Inc. (Nasdaq: TFIN) disclosed plans to unveil its fourth-quarter financial results and management insights on January 22, 2025, after the market closes. The company specified that these details will be accessible on their website, tfin.com, post the release.

news.headline: STAG Industrial increases monthly dividend to $0.124167 per share ($1.49 annually). News from Boston.
news.summary: In Boston on January 10, 2025, the Board of Directors of STAG Industrial, Inc. announced an increase in the monthly common stock dividend to $0.124167 per share. This change results in an annualized dividend of $1.49 per share. The declared first quarter common stock dividend is set at this new rate. STAG Industrial, Inc. trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol STAG.

news.headline: Preferred Bank to release Q4 earnings on Jan 27, 2025, after market close. Conference call on Jan 28, 2025, at 2:00 pm ET.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Preferred Bank (NASDAQ: PFBC), a prominent independent commercial bank in California, revealed its intention to unveil the financial outcomes for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2024, post the market closure on Monday, January 27, 2025. The management is scheduled to conduct a conference call at 2:00 p.m. Eastern Time (11:00 a.m. Pacific Time) on Tuesday, January 28, 2025. This event will also be live-streamed on the Internet.

news.headline: Varonis Systems Inc. (Nasdaq: VRNS) to report Q4 2024 financial results on Feb. 4, 2025, after US markets close.
news.summary: Varonis Systems, Inc., a prominent data security company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol VRNS, disclosed its plan to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024. The announcement stated that the report will be made public after the closure of the U.S. financial markets on Tuesday, February 4, 2025.

news.headline: TEN Ltd. declares a quarterly cash dividend of $0.59375 per share for its Series F Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Athens, Greece, tanker operator TEN Ltd. declared a quarterly cash dividend of around $0.59375 per share for its Series F Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares (NYSE: TENPRF). The company, listed on NYSE under the symbol TEN, is a key player in crude, product, and LNG shipping.

news.headline: Nasdaq reports 12.1B short interest shares in 3,085 stocks as of Dec. 31, 2024, down from 2.65 to 2.50 days short interest.
news.summary: On December 31, 2024, the short interest for 3,085 Nasdaq Global Market securities was 12,137,206,474 shares, an increase from 11,912,589,852 shares in 3,063 Global Market issues on December 13, 2024. This end-of-December short interest reflects 2.50 days, down from 2.65 days in the previous reporting period.

news.headline: Codexis offers equity grants to 2 new employees: 23,000 stock options and 11,500 RSUs. Jan 10, 2025.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Codexis, Inc. in Redwood City, California revealed the authorization of equity grants for two newly recruited employees sanctioned by Codexis’ Board of Directors' Compensation Committee. The recent hires were provided equity incentives comprising of (i) options to buy 23,000 shares of Codexis common stock and (ii) 11,500 restricted stock units (RSUs) as inducement rewards under the firm’s 2024 Inducement Plan.

news.headline: Stock market falls, Dow plunges nearly 700 points due to rise in Treasury yields prompted by job report.
City Office REIT to release Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on Feb 20, 2025 before market opens.

news.headline: Nordstrom's holiday sales rise with a 4.9% total net sales increase and 5.8% comparable sales rise for nine weeks.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Nordstrom, Inc. disclosed a 4.9% rise in total Company net sales and a 5.8% increase in comparable sales for the nine-week holiday period concluding on January 4, 2025, compared to the same duration in 2023. This data excludes the nine weeks ending on December 30, 2023. Nordstrom, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol JWN.

news.headline: Accelerate Diagnostics reports preliminary Q4 and full-year 2024 results; aims to improve patient outcomes and lower costs.
news.summary: In Tucson, Arizona, on January 10, 2025, Accelerate Diagnostics, Inc. (Nasdaq: AXDX) - a company focused on in vitro diagnostics - announced its commitment to enhancing patient outcomes and reducing healthcare expenses. By swiftly diagnosing severe infections, Accelerate aims to lower costs and improve results for patients.

news.headline: Hershey CEO Michele Buck to retire on June 30, 2026. She will be stepping down as Chairman, President & CEO.
news.summary: In Hershey, Pennsylvania on January 10, 2025, the Hershey Company (NYSE: HSY) revealed that Michele Buck, Chairman of the Board of Directors, President, and CEO, has communicated her decision to retire from the company on June 30, 2026. Ms. Buck's announcement marks an important transition for the company as it looks ahead to her departure.

news.headline: Waste Connections to release Q4 2024 earnings and 2025 outlook on Feb 12, 2025 after stock market close.
news.summary: Waste Connections, Inc. (WCN), a leading waste management company, is set to disclose its financial performance for Q4 of 2024 and projections for FY 2025 on February 12, following the market close. Investors and stakeholders are eagerly awaiting this update from the Company, listed on both the Toronto (TSX) and New York Stock Exchange (NYSE). This report will provide valuable insights into the company's performance during the previous quarter and its anticipated trajectory for the upcoming year. Stay tuned for detailed figures and analysis on Waste Connections' performance.

news.headline: Kroger Family pledges $1M to support families affected by SoCal wildfires. Ralphs and Food4Less stores involved.
news.summary: In Cincinnati on January 10, 2025, the Kroger Family of Companies, which includes Ralphs and Food4Less stores in southern California, revealed plans to raise $1 million to support families affected by the destructive wildfires in the Los Angeles area. Their pledge aims to provide assistance to those facing challenges due to the ongoing crisis.

news.headline: VOXX International filed Form 12b-25 with SEC on Jan 10, 2025. Company is key in auto & consumer techs with biometrics.
news.summary: In a recent announcement made in Orlando, Florida on January 10, 2025, VOXX International Corporation, a renowned company listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol VOXX, shared its latest developments. Specializing in automotive and consumer technologies on a global scale, VOXX also collaborates with strategic partners in biometrics. This update includes the filing of a Form, showcasing continued growth and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Replimune grants equity awards to new non-executive employees, complying with Nasdaq rule.
news.summary: WOBURN, Massachusetts - On January 10, 2025, Replimune Group, Inc. revealed the allocation of inducement equity awards to recently recruited non-executive staff members. The company, listed as NASDAQ: REPL, operates in the clinical stage of biotechnology, focusing on innovative oncolytic immunotherapies. This initiative signifies the company's commitment to talent acquisition and retention, aimed at advancing its key objectives.

news.headline: For the week, unofficially, the S&P 500 fell 1.94%, the Nasdaq declined 2.34%, and the Dow fell 1.86%.
TrustCo Bank Corp NY will release Q4 2024 results on Jan 21, 2025, followed by a conference call on Jan 22 at 9:00 AM ET. Replay info - US: 1-866-813-9403, Access code 619481.
news.summary: TrustCo Bank Corp NY (Nasdaq: TRST) announced the release of its fourth quarter 2024 results on January 21, 2025. The results are typically disclosed on the 21st of reporting months (January, April, July, and October), or the next open market day if the 21st falls on a non-trading day. A conference call to discuss these results is scheduled for January 22, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET. To participate, individuals can dial 1-833-470-1428 in the US or 1-833-950-0062 in Canada with the access code 645488. A replay of the call will be accessible for thirty days by dialing 1-866-813-9403 in the US with access code 619481.

news.headline: InspireSemi issues 5,031.25 PV shares at $16 each to settle $80,500 interest payment to holders of 10% debentures.
news.summary: Inspire Semiconductor Holdings Inc., a chip design company based in Vancouver and Austin, announced on January 10, 2025, that it issued a total of 5,031.25 proportionate voting shares at a price of $16.00 per share to settle $80,500 in interest owed to holders of 10% unsecured convertible debentures issued on January 6, 2023. These shares were issued to provide accelerated computing solutions for High Performance Computing (HPC), AI, graph analytics, and other compute-intensive workloads.

news.headline: Inception Growth Acquisition Ltd deposited $11,199.60 to extend business combination period by 1 month to Feb 13, 2025.
news.summary: A special purpose acquisition company, Inception Growth Acquisition Limited (NASDAQ: IGTA), recently shared a significant update on January 10, 2025. They disclosed that they placed $11,199.60 into their trust account on January 9, 2025. This action was taken to prolong the timeframe within which the company must finalize a business combination. The extension granted them an additional month, pushing the deadline from January 13, 2025 to February 13, 2025. The purpose behind this move was to allow the company more time to successfully complete their intended business combination.

news.headline: First Hawaiian (NASDAQ: FHB) to release Q4 2024 financial results on Jan 31, 2025 before markets open; conference call at 1pm EST.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, First Hawaiian, Inc. (NASDAQ: FHB) revealed its intention to publish the financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on January 31, 2025, pre-market opening. The company is scheduled to hold a conference call on the same day at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time (8:00 a.m. Hawaii Time) to deliberate on the outcomes.

news.headline: Mark Zuckerberg accused of using pirated data for Meta AI training, despite warnings. Ongoing lawsuit reveals shocking details.
news.summary: In a recent court document filed in a legal battle against Meta, it is claimed that Mark Zuckerberg and other corporate leaders sanctioned the contentious dataset despite receiving internal cautionary advice.

news.headline: Gov. Mills proposes raising Maine's tobacco tax to protect kids and save lives. Campaign for Tobacco-Free Kids supports this move.
news.summary: Yolonda C. Richardson, President & CEO of the Campaign for Tobacco-Free Kids, expressed strong backing for Gov. Janet Mills' recent proposition in her state budget on Jan. 10, 2025. The proposal seeks a substantial hike in Maine's tobacco tax.

news.headline: Universal Brain published groundbreaking depression research using multiple event-related potentials. The study supports their precision psychiatry approach.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Palo Alto, California, Universal Brain, a groundbreaking technology company, revealed new research backing their neuroscience-based strategy for precision psychiatry. This research provides valuable information for tailored treatment of depression, emphasizing the importance of personalized approaches in mental healthcare. The company's innovative methods are paving the way for improved understanding and treatment of mental health disorders.

news.headline: Generational Group sells GEI Graphics to Jeff Harper, closing on December 19, 2024. GEI Graphics founded in 1946, specialized in prepress techniques.
news.summary: A prominent mergers and acquisitions advisory firm, Generational Group, recently completed the sale of Graphic Engravers, Inc. also known as GEI Graphics to Jeff Harper. The acquisition was finalized on December 19, 2024. GEI Graphics, a key player in graphic solutions since 1946, is based in Bensenville, Illinois, and is recognized for its expertise in prepress techniques and digital flexographic production. For more information, visit their website at www.geigraphics.com.

news.headline: MOC Imbalance
NASA to cover Firefly's first commercial moon launch Blue Ghost Mission 1 on Jan. 15, part of CLPS initiative for Artemis campaign.
news.summary: Scheduled for launch on Wednesday, January 15, 2025, Firefly Aerospace's Blue Ghost Mission 1 aims to transport NASA science and technology to the Moon as part of the CLPS initiative and Artemis campaign. This mission signifies a significant milestone in space exploration, with Firefly Aerospace playing a key role in advancing lunar exploration efforts.

news.headline: Bank of America reverses interest rate cut calls as December jobs report surprises. No cuts expected in 2025 due to strong job growth. Payrolls at 256,000 exceeded estimates of 175,000. Labor market resilience leads to anticipation of interest rate hikes.
news.summary: The December jobs report has exceeded expectations, leading to a shift in market predictions. Top Wall Street investment banks no longer anticipate further interest rate cuts in 2025 and are now preparing for the possibility of rate hikes. Bank of America has revised its forecast, abandoning the expectation of two rate cuts and noting that an "A+" jobs report closes the door for additional cuts. The nonfarm payrolls for December reached 256,000, well above expectations of 175,000, and significantly higher than the consensus estimate of 160,000. This robust data indicates strong resilience in the U.S. economy, with wage growth outpacing inflation and supporting purchasing power. The strength of income growth has been emphasized, with indications of positive trends in the labor market.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency market is up on Friday with: Bitcoin at $94,777 (+3.3%), Ethereum at $3,266 (+2.5%), Dogecoin at $0.3323 (+4.7%).Transaction volume drops 6.2%, netflows down 335%, liquidated traders at 111,905 for $381.10 million in the past 24 hours.
news.summary: On Friday, the cryptocurrency market saw a surge in prices following a volatile day. Bitcoin (BTC) climbed to $94,777, marking a 3.3% increase, while Ethereum (ETH) rose to $3,266 with a gain of 2.5%. Other notable cryptocurrencies also experienced gains: Solana (SOL) at $188.06 (+2.3%), XRP at $2.36 (+3.4%), Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.3323 (+4.7%), and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.00002151 (+2.8%).According to IntoTheBlock data, large transaction volume dropped by 6.2%, daily active addresses fell by 0.02%, and transactions over $100,000 decreased from 11,991 to 11,484 in a day. Additionally, exchanges netflows decreased by 335%. Coinglass reported that 111,905 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, resulting in a total of $381.10 million.In notable developments, there is an exclusive report addressing key questions about Bitcoin's future just 10 days before the inauguration. The Crypto Fear and Greed Index hit its lowest level since October as Bitcoin dropped below $92,000, while Dogecoin and Shiba Inu were trading in a particular range. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Convoy of Hope aids Greater Los Angeles wildfire survivors; sending semi truckloads of relief supplies, including food and water.
news.summary: Today, the non-profit organization Convoy of Hope is taking action in response to the devastating wildfires in the greater Los Angeles area. They are providing essential relief supplies to assist those impacted by the ongoing crisis. Multiple semi trucks filled with items such as food, bottled water, and hygiene products are on their way to the affected region. This initiative aims to support the affected individuals and communities during these challenging times.

news.headline: Georgia Power crew on standby for Winter Storm Cora, with freezing rain in Georgia; customers urged to stay safe.
news.summary: As freezing rain and ice persist today due to a winter weather system in Georgia, crews are ready to respond. Georgia Power reminds customers to prioritize safety and stay informed about the weather conditions. The incident occurred on January 10, 2025.

news.headline: Capital Advantage, Inc. provides tailored financial services for Kaiser Permanente® and TPMG employees in Walnut Creek, California.
news.summary: In Walnut Creek, California on January 10, 2025, a renowned wealth management firm, Capital Advantage, Inc., unveiled tailored services for employees of Kaiser Permanente® and The Permanente Medical Group (TPMG). These services are specifically crafted to address the distinctive financial requirements of these employees. Capital Advantage, Inc. aims to provide specialized financial solutions to a significant number of employees within the aforementioned organizations.

news.headline: Reservations open for Canada's first Gordon Ramsay Steak at River Rock Casino; follow-up to Gordon Ramsay Burger launch.
news.summary: Great Canadian Entertainment, a top player in gaming and hospitality in Canada, has revealed that reservations are now being accepted for Gordon Ramsay Steak at River Rock Casino Resort in Vancouver, British Columbia. The partnership with Gordon Ramsay North America comes after the popular debut of Gordon Ramsay Burger at Great Canadian Casino Vancouver in December 2023. Gordon Ramsay Steak is set to offer a sophisticated steakhouse experience, blending the renowned chef's culinary expertise with upscale dining. This announcement marks an exciting development for Great Canadian Entertainment, solidifying its position in the industry.

news.headline: Price surge on L.A. rentals due to California fires, defying emergency law limits of 10% hike overnight.
news.summary: Amid a state of emergency, several rental listings have reportedly increased above the permitted 10 percent limit, violating the anti-price gouging law in place. The sudden surge in prices has raised concerns as it goes against regulations set to prevent exploitation during emergencies.

news.headline: Nokia Corp. buyback own shares on 10.01.2025.
Kidz Gym partners with Developmental Pathways for event with families of children with special needs in Parker, Colo.
news.summary: A gym in Parker, Colorado is partnering with Developmental Pathways to host an event for families with children who have special needs. Kidz Gym is welcoming those with intellectual delays, physical disabilities, sensory integration challenges, and other unique requirements to participate in the Ultra Families' event. The event is scheduled for January 10, 2025, and aims to provide a fun and inclusive experience for families.

news.headline: CUPE Ontario and OMW support AMO's report on Ontario's homelessness crisis during federal and provincial election, emphasizing the urgent need for action.
news.summary: A recent report titled “Municipalities under pressure: The human and financial cost of Ontario’s homelessness crisis” by the Association of Municipalities of Ontario prompted a statement from CUPE Ontario and its Ontario Municipal Workers committee (OMW). As both federal and provincial elections approach, CUPE Ontario and OMW emphasize the significance of AMO and municipalities highlighting the severity of homelessness crisis.

news.headline: Monday FX Option Expiries
Amplify Surgical hosts 4th Annual Endoscopic Spine Symposium in Orange, CA with dualPortal and dualX Technologies.
news.summary: On March 29th, 2025, Amplify Surgical is set to hold the 4th Annual Endoscopic Spine Symposium in Orange, CA. The symposium will showcase the dualPortal and dualX Technologies. Based in Irvine, California, Amplify Surgical is a medical device company known for its innovative solutions in the field. The event announcement was made on January 10th, 2025, through a PRNewswire-PRWeb release.

news.headline: KOAMTAC enhances KDC8 Software Decoder with data wedge for barcode transfer and AR feature for product visualization.
news.summary: KOAMTAC's KDC8 Software Decoder has been updated to include data wedge functionality, enabling smooth barcode data transfer to Android applications. The new version also introduces an augmented reality (AR) demo feature, allowing users to scan a barcode and instantly view a product image along with its stock quantity. This enhancement enhances user experience and productivity, making it easier to interact with barcoded products. Users now have the option to leverage these advanced features for improved efficiency.

news.headline: Free webinar by Xtalks on adapting clinical research strategy for CDx in oncology. Learn about regulatory changes for companion diagnostics, including laboratory-developed tests.
news.summary: Join our upcoming webinar to gain insights on the regulatory environment for companion diagnostics (CDx), with a focus on recent updates to the oversight of laboratory-developed tests (LDTs). Experts in the field will analyze how these regulatory shifts are influencing the utilization of CDx in oncology. Don't miss the opportunity to learn more about this critical topic that affects the medical industry. Register now to secure your spot!
